behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the relevant files/classes (PreTrainedConfig, RotaryEmbeddingConfigMixin, auto_docstring functions), fields (transformers_version, architectures), the allowlist, the allowed_params keyword, and the exact expected missing-keys list.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes symptoms and expected behaviors without specifying line changes or exact code replacements; the agent must still figure out how to convert ClassVar to instance fields and how to dispatch rope_type.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavior (dataclasses.fields, instance isolation, no crash, allowed_params filtering) and dynamically discover the filter parameter name rather than hardcoding, allowing alternative implementations.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests import modules and call functions via subprocess, checking runtime behavior (validate_rope calls, PreTrainedConfig instantiation, auto_method_docstring invocation).

test_not_tautological.reason: F2p tests require actual behavior changes: dataclasses.fields must include the names, instance isolation must hold, validate_rope must not crash on {}, and allowed_params filtering must actually filter output.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover all three bugs: config ClassVar conversion, rope empty dict handling, and docstring parameter filtering, matching the three described bugs.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are organized with section headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) and descriptive names/docstrings per test.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code-behavior, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and identifiers in instruction.md match those in the repo and tests (configuration_utils.py, modeling_rope_utils.py, auto_docstring.py).

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the affected modules/classes by domain role but does not pinpoint specific line numbers or provide the exact code changes.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code-only task, not an agentmd/config task.
